problem id: 719b314e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) AND ROT(4)

examples:
  00101001 -> 00010010
  00101010 -> 00000000
  01011000 -> 10000000
  10110110 -> 01101001
  00010010 -> 00100000
  00011101 -> 00010000
  01001011 -> 10010100
  11010000 -> 00000001

query: 01101001
predicted answer: 10010010
